title: Hwajeon with Citrus and Vegetables
description: A traditional Korean hwajeon pancake infused with citrus flavors and topped with a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the Korean rice flour and pure water until a smooth batter forms.
Add the chopped green onions, orange zest, lemon zest, and citrus syrup to the batter, and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Brush the pan with vegetable oil and pour in the batter.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
Transfer the pancake to a plate and top with shredded carrots and zucchini if desired.
